---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Description
Describe the feature or enhancement in clear, concise terms.

## Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Solution
How should this feature work? Provide as much detail as helpful.

## Alternatives Considered
Are there other approaches you've considered? What are the tradeoffs?

## Additional Context
Any other information that might help (e.g., references to agricultural best practices, other irrigation systems, user feedback).

## Is This a Breaking Change?
Would this require changes to existing configurations or behavior?
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Non-breaking enhancement
